summary.shape_sentence: Rotational open into a failed morning lift, then a steady lower-high downtrend that pressed into the close and finished near the day's low.

goat.note: Standout afternoon sell leg expanded the breakdown from the low 24,000s into the 23,800s.

red_circles.behavior: Clustered at lower highs and consistently marked continuation shorts during the downtrend.

green_circles.behavior: Mostly countertrend bounce markers; reactions were brief and failed to repair structure.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply concentrated around 24,180-24,260 and higher overhead zones; these areas were repeatedly respected and capped rallies.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand appeared in stair-step fashion below price, but most zones were only briefly defended before being broken.

time_markers.10am_blue: First-hour strength was testing the upper morning range before a bearish rejection formed.
time_markers.12pm_red: Trend had shifted toward downside control; midday bounce attempts were weak and sold.
time_markers.2pm_green: Continuation lower with expanding downside pressure and poor reclaim behavior.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed near the session low after a late sell extension with no meaningful recovery.

takeaway: Bearish trend day with an early failed lift and then orderly lower-high continuation. Useful as a reference when morning strength cannot hold supply and afternoon trade becomes sequential support failure.
